base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of limit_break_vfx — a effect_layer from 1997 final fantasy vii. Limit-break VFX per character (Omnislash/Catastrophe/Final Heaven/etc.). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
